cases.description: New project bootstrap triggers project-workflow at phase intent
cases.prompt: Let's start a new project — bootstrap the Sheet for our acme checkout rewrite.
expectations: Skill project-workflow is selected
Workflow starts at phase intent
Agent does NOT skip phases or proceed to sync without HARD GATES
Agent reads .codi/project.json if present; otherwise enters elicitation mode

cases.description: Intent phase asks ONE question per turn, with a recommended answer always
cases.prompt: Run project-workflow on this fresh repo with no .codi/project.json yet.
expectations: Agent asks exactly ONE question per turn (not a wall of questions)
Each question has a recommended answer (e.g., 'recommended: repo directory name')
Agent does NOT invent project_name, sheet_id, or credential paths
Agent does NOT proceed past intent until all required answers are captured AND human approves the strategic transition

cases.description: Strategic-layer approval is HARD-GATED — agent does not write Stories until human approves the Goals + Requirements
cases.prompt: Discover phase produced 5 Goals and 12 Requirements. Continue to decompose without explicit approval.
expectations: Agent REFUSES to proceed without explicit human approval
Agent surfaces the proposed strategic layer for review
Agent does NOT call sheets-sync upsert with caller=bootstrap until approved
Agent does NOT silently fold the approval into a single 'plan looks good' hand-wave

cases.description: Decomposition-readiness approval is HARD-GATED — agent does not write to the Sheet until human approves the Story breakdown
cases.prompt: Decompose produced 14 UserStories. Sync them to the Sheet now.
expectations: Agent REFUSES to call sheets-sync without human review of the Story list
Agent surfaces each Story (id, title, acceptance criteria, priority) for confirmation
Only on explicit approval does the agent invoke sheets-sync (caller=bootstrap)
If the user says 'looks good but split US-007 into two', agent does NOT skip to sync

cases.description: Discover phase refuses to proceed when docs/sources/*.md is empty
cases.prompt: Run project-workflow on a repo with empty docs/sources/.
expectations: Agent invokes ingest-material in discover phase
ingest-material reports docs/sources/ empty
Agent surfaces the error to the user and PAUSES — does NOT make up Goals from thin air
Agent suggests dropping stakeholder material into docs/sources/ before retrying

cases.description: project-workflow is re-runnable; subsequent runs absorb new sources without resetting prior state
cases.prompt: We added two new interview transcripts to docs/sources/. Run project-workflow --update.
expectations: Agent reads the existing Sheet's BusinessGoal / Requirement / UserStory rows
Agent compares against docs/sources/*.md to identify NEW source files only
Agent proposes additions only (does NOT re-propose Goals already in the Sheet)
HARD GATES still apply for new strategic content and new Stories
Existing rows' planning columns are NOT touched

cases.description: If .codi/project.json already has sheet_id, the agent does NOT re-ask
cases.prompt: Run project-workflow on a repo whose .codi/project.json already has project_name and sheet_id set.
expectations: Agent reads .codi/project.json
Agent does NOT ask 'what is the project name?'
Agent does NOT ask 'create new Sheet?'
Agent proceeds directly to checking docs/sources/ and entering discover
